info.title: E-Pharmacy app
info.description: This is the documentation of E-Pharmacy - a web platform for online pharmacies.

post.description: Login user with email and password

200.description: Successfully logged in an user and set authentication cookies

Set-Cookie.description: HTTP-only cookie with session or refresh token.

204.description: Successfully logged out. All authentication cookies have been cleared.

Set-Cookie.description: Cookies cleared by the server. Example: `Set-Cookie: sessionId=; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict`

get.description: Retrieve information about the currently authenticated user
Public endpoint. Returns pharmacies near given coordinates. Supports pagination.
Public endpoint. Supports pagination and filtering by category and search query.

200.description: List of products with pagination and filters

get.description: Public endpoint. Returns a single product by its ID.

get.summary: Get cart items for a user
get.description: Returns the cart of the currently authenticated user, including populated product details.

put.description: Create or update the cart for the authenticated user. Replaces all items in the cart.

items.description: List of items to set in the cart

post.summary: Checkout the cart for the authenticated user
post.description: Place an order for all items in the user's cart. Empties the cart after checkout.

schema.description: Additional order data (e.g., shipping info, payment method)

notes.example: Leave package at the front door

user.description: ID of the user placing the order

items.description: List of items in the order

shippingAddress.description: Shipping address provided by the user

notes.example: Leave package at the front door

user.description: ID of the user who left the review

photo.description: Optional photo URL attached to the review

testimonial.example: Great service, I really liked everything!

createdAt.description: Date when the review was created

updatedAt.description: Date when the review was last updated

reviews.description: List of review IDs related to the product

createdAt.description: Date when the product was created

updatedAt.description: Date when the product was last updated

user.description: ID of the user who owns the cart

items.description: List of items in the cart

product.description: ID of the product in the cart

createdAt.description: Date when the cart was created

updatedAt.description: Date when the cart was last updated

message.example: Name should have at least 3 characters
